description: An open-top rectangular container with rounded vertical corners, shelled inward to form a 2mm wall thickness. Centered at the origin and resting on the XY plane.
notes: To maintain a uniform 2mm wall thickness, the inner cavity must have a corner fillet radius of 3mm (outer radius 5mm minus 2mm wall thickness). The outer bounding box must be exactly 60x40x30mm, centered on (0,0) in X and Y, with the bottom at Z=0.
